# INNO Transformer Temperature Products

INNO provides oil temperature indicators, winding temperature indicators and integrated monitoring devices for oil-immersed transformers worldwide.

Primary website: https://ankaili.com/
Products: https://ankaili.com/products/
Applications: https://ankaili.com/applications/
Technical blog: https://ankaili.com/blog/
Contact: fjinnonet@gmail.com

The site distinguishes measured transformer top-oil temperature, traditionally simulated winding temperature and direct winding sensing. Product values are planning references. Confirm the current model-specific datasheet, drawing and terminal diagram before ordering.
